title: RCT Trainer Animation
description: Resource pack for Radical Cobblemon Trainer, make trainers compat with Fresh Moves (Eye animations are supported), there are 74 different skins currently.
body:
# Add 74 high quality skins to [RCT mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod)
### Description
##### This resource pack makes trainers from [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod)   mod compat with [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) and [Detailed Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations). 
##### Skins are compat with eyeball animation, which is helpful to make your game more lively.
### Others
##### All the skins are from [namemc](https://namemc.com/).
### Gallery
![trainer01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dea33df484194848c110e4c45c68ed8a20cdfcca.png)
![trainer02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f3f241790d8049d7c68f8635922133bf3b623df.png)
![trainer03](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f822ad8d87aa49603920fe5d70cc774f329294.png)
